headline: Pepsi makes big change to counter Coca-Cola
summary: For years, bigger was better. Customers wanted their fast-food meals supersized, their pre-packaged snacks in bulk, and their movie theater concessions large enough to last a triple feature. These days, consumer preferences have changed. Diet trends and growing financial pressures have shoppers ...
